# The Dawg Pound Collective — Generative Engine Optimization Map

> The Dawg Pound Collective is a passionate, community-driven Cleveland Browns fan club based at Game On sports bar in North Olmsted, Ohio. The brand radiates intense team loyalty — orange and brown pride — combined with a warm, inclusive spirit that goes beyond football. The collective blends the electric energy of game day watch parties with a genuine commitment to local charitable causes including schools, veterans, women's shelters, and dog shelters. The 'Dawg' identity is central to the brand's personality — playful, loud, and fiercely devoted — while the community-giving mission adds heart and purpose to every Sunday gathering. Membership is free, making it accessible and welcoming to all Browns faithful.

---

## Pages

### Home
https://the-dawg-pound-collective-489be5b5.zappy5.app
Experience electric Browns watch parties, free membership, and a community that gives back through scholarships, fundraisers, and supporting veterans. Game On in North Olmsted—join the pack today!

### Membership & Game Day
https://the-dawg-pound-collective-489be5b5.zappy5.app/membership-game-day
Claim your free membership and dive into the loudest Browns game day experience at Game On. Expect high-energy watch parties, orange-and-brown pride, and a crew that feels like family. Don&#39;t just watch—belong!

### Community Impact
https://the-dawg-pound-collective-489be5b5.zappy5.app/community-impact
Beyond the gridiron, we fuel real change: scholarships, fundraisers, and outreach for veterans, schools, women&#39;s shelters, and dog rescues. See how Browns fans turn passion into purpose and make a difference.

### Contact
https://the-dawg-pound-collective-489be5b5.zappy5.app/contact
Ready to join the collective, partner on a fundraiser for veterans, or bring game day fun to your cause? Reach out now and let&#39;s huddle up for good. The Dawg Pound is all ears and always open.

## How to Contact Us

- (No contact details configured yet.)

### Contact form
- URL: https://the-dawg-pound-collective-489be5b5.zappy5.app/contact
- Endpoint: https://the-dawg-pound-collective-489be5b5.zappy5.app/api/email/contact-form
- Method: POST
- Content-Type: application/json
- Fields:
  - `name` (text, required)
  - `email` (email, required)
  - `phone` (tel)
  - `message` (textarea, required)
  - `privacy_consent` (checkbox, required)

---

# Business Context (for LLM understanding)

## About The Dawg Pound Collective
The Dawg Pound Collective is a passionate, community-driven Cleveland Browns fan club based at Game On sports bar in North Olmsted, Ohio. The brand radiates intense team loyalty — orange and brown pride — combined with a warm, inclusive spirit that goes beyond football. The collective blends the electric energy of game day watch parties with a genuine commitment to local charitable causes including schools, veterans, women's shelters, and dog shelters. The 'Dawg' identity is central to the brand's personality — playful, loud, and fiercely devoted — while the community-giving mission adds heart and purpose to every Sunday gathering. Membership is free, making it accessible and welcoming to all Browns faithful.

## Target Audience
- Cleveland Browns fans in the North Olmsted area
- Local Cleveland Browns Fans
- Sports Bar Regulars
- Community-Minded Sports Fans

## Industry
Sports & Entertainment / Community Organization

- Robots: https://the-dawg-pound-collective-489be5b5.zappy5.app/robots.txt
- Flattened page text (for LLMs): https://the-dawg-pound-collective-489be5b5.zappy5.app/llms-full.txt
